scripts.build: cd packages/fuzzy-tui && npm run build && cd ../fuzzy-ai && npm run build && cd ../fuzzy-agent && npm run build && cd ../fuzzy-code && npm run build && cd ../fuzzy-web-ui && npm run build && cd ../fuzzy-pods && npm run build && cd ../fuzzy-code-vsce && npm run build
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "fuzzy-ai,fuzzy-agent,fuzzy-code,fuzzy-web-ui,fuzzy-tui" --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow,red,white,green,magenta" "cd packages/fuzzy-ai && npm run dev" "cd packages/fuzzy-agent && npm run dev" "cd packages/fuzzy-code && npm run dev" "cd packages/fuzzy-web-ui && npm run dev" "cd packages/fuzzy-tui && npm run dev"
scripts.dev:tsc: concurrently --names "fuzzy-ai,fuzzy-web-ui" --prefix-colors "cyan,green" "cd packages/fuzzy-ai && npm run dev:tsc" "cd packages/fuzzy-web-ui && npm run dev:tsc"
scripts.check: biome check --write --error-on-warnings . && tsgo --noEmit && npm run check:browser-smoke && cd packages/fuzzy-web-ui && npm run check && cd ../fuzzy-code-vsce && npm run check
scripts.check:browser-smoke: sh -c 'esbuild scripts/browser-smoke-entry.ts --bundle --platform=browser --format=esm --log-limit=0 --outfile=/tmp/fuzzy-browser-smoke.js > /tmp/fuzzy-browser-smoke-errors.log 2>&1 || { echo "Browser smoke check failed. See /tmp/fuzzy-browser-smoke-errors.log"; exit 1; }'
scripts.version:patch: npm version patch -ws --no-git-tag-version && node scripts/sync-versions.js && shx rm -rf node_modules packages/*/node_modules package-lock.json && npm install
scripts.version:minor: npm version minor -ws --no-git-tag-version && node scripts/sync-versions.js && shx rm -rf node_modules packages/*/node_modules package-lock.json && npm install
scripts.version:major: npm version major -ws --no-git-tag-version && node scripts/sync-versions.js && shx rm -rf node_modules packages/*/node_modules package-lock.json && npm install
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run check
scripts.publish: npm run prepublishOnly && npm publish -ws --access public
scripts.publish:dry: npm run prepublishOnly && npm publish -ws --access public --dry-run
